mapper.select: SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.game_id, c.quantity, c.create_time, c.update_time, g.game_name, g.cover_image, g.price, g.original_price, g.stock FROM ps5_cart c LEFT JOIN ps5_game g ON c.game_id = g.game_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT cart_id, user_id, game_id, quantity, create_time, update_time FROM ps5_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND game_id = #{gameId} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.game_id, c.quantity, c.create_time, c.update_time, g.game_name, g.cover_image, g.price, g.original_price, g.stock FROM ps5_cart c LEFT JOIN ps5_game g ON c.game_id = g.game_id WHERE c.cart_id = #{cartId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ps5_cart (user_id, game_id, quantity, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gameId}, #{quantity}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: UPDATE ps5_cart SET quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ps5_cart WHERE cart_id IN #{id}
